project.title: 霧燈疑案社
project.setting: Original fictional multicultural port city Graybridge, circa 1890s

defaults.safeArea: Keep irreplaceable content inside the center 64% width and center 70% height; reserve the lower 30% as a subdued dialogue-box zone; survive centered 9:16 crop.
defaults.style: Original mature 2D visual-novel illustration, semi-realistic human proportions, confident lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and transparent watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain, controlled cinematic gaslight, painterly rather than photorealistic.
defaults.exclusions: No text, letters, numbers, logos, interface, watermark, deerstalker hat, curved pipe, Inverness cape, 221B reference, copyrighted detective character, actor likeness, chibi proportions, flat mascot vector style, photorealism, gore, malformed hands or extra fingers.

characters.identityLock: 33-year-old Taiwanese woman; oval face, high cheekbones, dark almond eyes, glossy black center-parted hair in a low braided bun with one short strand beside her right cheek; charcoal high-collar blouse, fitted aubergine long coat, oxblood gloves, brass compass brooch; folding brass monocular loupe and cream clue cards.

26-year-old Black British woman; deep brown skin, softly elongated round face, bright dark-brown eyes, black coiled hair in a consistent crown braid; deep teal high-collar blouse, mustard short waistcoat, navy long skirt, ink-stained cuffs; brass pince-nez on a chain, wooden cipher wheel and small grid notebook.

28-year-old Taiwanese man; warm tan skin, refined square face, expressive thick eyebrows, neatly side-parted short black hair; olive waistcoat, ivory shirt with rolled sleeves, rust-red neckerchief, dark brown trousers; leather camera satchel, folding newspaper camera, pencil and folded unreadable newspaper.

characters.displayName: 奧斯卡・維爾 Oscar Vale
characters.identityLock: 43-year-old white Graybridge inspector; tall broad-shouldered build, rectangular weathered face, grey-blue eyes, short salt-and-pepper hair, neatly trimmed short beard, faint scar through left eyebrow; midnight-blue double-breasted municipal long coat, grey waistcoat, dark burgundy scarf, silver whistle; black bowler hat usually held and a plain leather case folder without real insignia.

assets.usage: Canonical identity reference for every Lin Wuhua image; not shown directly in gameplay.
assets.prompt: Create an original character model sheet for Lin Wuhua, a 33-year-old Taiwanese woman and calm private investigator in the fictional multicultural port city Graybridge, circa 1890s. She has an oval face, high cheekbones, dark almond eyes, glossy black center-parted hair fixed in a low braided bun, and one short strand beside her right cheek. Her fixed outfit is a charcoal high-collar blouse, fitted aubergine long coat, oxblood gloves and a brass compass brooch. Her fixed props are a folding brass monocular loupe and cream clue cards. Show exactly the same woman in one full-body front view, one three-quarter view and one side view, plus four consistent head expressions: neutral, insight, concern and skepticism. Clean warm vellum studio sheet, separated figures, accurate hands, mature semi-realistic proportions. Original mature 2D visual-novel illustration, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and transparent watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain. No labels or text, no logo, no watermark, no deerstalker, no pipe, no cape, no copyrighted character, no actor likeness, no photorealism.

assets.usage: Canonical identity reference for every Ada Bell image; not shown directly in gameplay.
assets.prompt: Create an original character model sheet for Ada Bell, a 26-year-old Black British archive conservator and cipher expert in the fictional multicultural port city Graybridge, circa 1890s. She has deep brown skin, a softly elongated round face, bright dark-brown eyes and black coiled hair fixed in a crown braid. Her fixed outfit is a deep teal high-collar blouse, mustard short waistcoat, navy long skirt and subtly ink-stained cuffs. Her fixed props are brass pince-nez on a chain, a wooden cipher wheel and a small grid notebook. Show exactly the same woman in one full-body front view, one three-quarter view and one side view, plus four consistent head expressions: welcoming, delighted, concerned and analytical. Clean warm vellum studio sheet, separated figures, accurate hands, mature semi-realistic proportions. Original mature 2D visual-novel illustration, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and transparent watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain. No labels or text, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted character, no actor likeness, no photorealism.

Show exactly the same man in one full-body front view, one three-quarter view and one side view, plus four consistent head expressions: friendly, triumphant, sheepish and alarmed. Clean warm vellum studio sheet, separated figures, accurate hands, mature semi-realistic proportions. Original mature 2D visual-novel illustration, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and transparent watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain. No labels or text, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted character, no actor likeness, no photorealism.

assets.usage: Canonical identity reference for every Oscar Vale image; not shown directly in gameplay.
assets.prompt: Create an original character model sheet for Oscar Vale, a 43-year-old municipal inspector and procedural rival in the fictional multicultural port city Graybridge, circa 1890s. He is tall and broad-shouldered with a rectangular weathered face, grey-blue eyes, short salt-and-pepper hair, a neatly trimmed short beard and a faint scar through his left eyebrow. His fixed outfit is a midnight-blue double-breasted municipal long coat, grey waistcoat, dark burgundy scarf and silver whistle. His fixed props are a black bowler hat usually held in one hand and a plain leather case folder without real insignia. Show exactly the same man in one full-body front view, one three-quarter view and one side view, plus four consistent head expressions: formal, doubtful, shocked and grudgingly approving. Clean warm vellum studio sheet, separated figures, accurate hands, mature semi-realistic proportions. Original mature 2D visual-novel illustration, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and transparent watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain. No labels or text, no logo, no watermark, no deerstalker, no pipe, no cape, no copyrighted character, no actor likeness, no photorealism.

assets.usage: Default mentor dialogue; left-side character card.
assets.prompt: Using the attached canonical Lin Wuhua model sheet as the exact identity and clothing reference, create one portrait-format three-quarter-body visual-novel character illustration. Preserve her face, low braided bun, aubergine long coat, charcoal blouse, oxblood gloves and brass compass brooch exactly. She stands on the left and turns gently toward the right, quietly listening to the player, calm almond eyes, relaxed mouth, one gloved hand resting over two cream clue cards and the other lowered. Her body language leaves conversational space. Low-detail fog-green to coal-black ink-wash background with soft vignette, rectangular image, head and both hands fully visible. Mature 2D visual-novel art, semi-realistic proportions, lithographic ink, layered gouache, subtle aged-paper grain and restrained gaslight rim light. No text, border, logo, watermark, deerstalker, pipe, cape, actor likeness or malformed hands.

assets.usage: Correct answer and case milestone reaction.

Positioned left and facing right, she shows restrained but unmistakable delight after the player solves a deduction: eyes bright, a rare confident half-smile, shoulders opening, folding brass loupe lifted as it catches one small gaslight glint, her other hand offering the solved blank clue card toward the player. Elegant adult celebration, not a childish jump. Low-detail spectral-teal and coal ink-wash background with amber rim light, head and hands safe in frame. Lithographic ink and gouache, subtle paper grain. No text, logo, watermark, copyrighted character, actor likeness, deerstalker, pipe or malformed hands.

assets.usage: Daily-practice home and calm return state.
assets.prompt: Wide establishing background plate of the Lantern & Lens Society reading room at dawn in the original fictional 1890s port city Graybridge. A welcoming walnut study with tall bookcases, a broad investigation table, brass magnifying instruments, pinned blank evidence cards, four distinctive empty chairs and one gas lamp still glowing as cool fog-blue sunrise enters a bay window. A row of small unlit desk lanterns suggests daily progress. Cozy mystery, no people. Keep the central investigation table and bay window inside the center safe area, preserve a centered phone crop, and make the lower 30 percent darker and low-detail for a dialogue box. Original mature 2D adventure-game background, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache and watercolor, subtle aged-paper grain, fog green, vellum, coal and restrained gaslight amber. No readable text, UI, logo, watermark, 221B reference or copyrighted setting.

assets.usage: Main-story and difficult-case hub.
assets.prompt: Create the exact same Lantern & Lens Society reading room as the attached dawn reference, now during a heavy rainy night. Preserve furniture layout, bay window, investigation table, four chairs and brass instruments. Rain beads on the glass, distant spectral-teal lightning diffuses through coal fog, two gas lamps make intimate amber islands over blank clue cards, and the rest of the room recedes into aubergine shadow. No people. Keep major objects in the central safe area, retain a centered 9:16 crop, and suppress detail and contrast in the lower 30 percent for dialogue. Original painterly 2D adventure-game background, lithographic ink, layered gouache, transparent watercolor and fine paper grain. No readable text, UI, logo, watermark, 221B or copyrighted detective references.

assets.usage: Observation, eyewitness and timeline exercises.
assets.prompt: Wide background plate of an original narrow gaslit alley in fictional 1890s Graybridge after rain. Wet cobbles reflect two amber lamps; brick service doors, a tipped handcart, a torn blank poster, fresh wheel tracks and a single dropped glove create several nonverbal clues. Fog closes the far end beneath iron fire escapes, with no close people and only one tiny indistinct silhouette far away. Arrange clues around the central 64 percent so they survive centered mobile crop; leave the lower 30 percent dark and low-detail for dialogue. Mature 2D mystery adventure background, semi-realistic architecture, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache, watercolor bloom and subtle paper grain, coal, fog green, oxblood and amber palette. No readable text, gore, body, logo, watermark, copyrighted detective reference or modern object.

assets.usage: Causal-chain and conflicting-testimony exercises.

No people. Symmetrical composition with the clue-bearing seats and window inside the central safe area, usable after centered 9:16 crop; lower 30 percent subdued for a dialogue box. Original 2D visual-novel mystery background, confident lithographic ink, layered gouache and watercolor, aged-paper grain, coal, fog green, brass and vellum. No readable labels, real railway logos, UI, watermark, copyrighted reference or modern elements.

assets.usage: Argument structure, research and education scenarios.
assets.prompt: Wide background plate of an original 1890s Graybridge Academy stepped lecture hall after class. Curved rows of dark wood benches descend to a demonstration table with brass scientific instruments, three unlabeled evidence cards, a large slate bearing only faint abstract diagrams with no letters, and tall windows filled with pearly fog. Inclusive and scholarly, no people. Keep demonstration table and slate in the central safe area and usable in centered phone crop; lower 30 percent quiet and dark for dialogue. Mature 2D visual-novel background, lithographic ink contours, layered gouache, transparent watercolor and subtle aged-paper grain, fog green, vellum, coal and brass. No readable equations, text, crest, logo, watermark, real university or copyrighted setting.

assets.usage: Weekly summary, streak milestone and season finale.

Open ironwork roof, giant clock gears framing the sides, brass telescope aimed across a foggy city, a circular star-chart table with abstract lines and glowing amber node points but no text, and distant gas lamps emerging one by one below. Hopeful mystery, not fantasy magic, no people. Keep telescope and chart table central for a 9:16 crop; make lower 30 percent low-detail for dialogue. Original mature 2D adventure-game illustration, lithographic ink, layered gouache, transparent watercolor, fine paper grain, spectral teal, midnight ink, brass and amber. No letters, numbers, logo, UI, watermark, copyrighted clocktower or modern skyline.

The route should flow from lower center toward upper center, leaving generous clean space around every node for HTML buttons. Mature hand-painted 2D visual-novel interface art, lithographic ink, layered gouache, watercolor and subtle paper grain, fog green, vellum, brass, oxblood and amber. The composition should communicate reconsideration, not failure or danger. Keep the central 40 percent calm enough for HTML hint text. Seven distinct small brass desk lanterns form a graceful arc across a dark walnut evidence table; the first six glow at graduated warmth while the seventh is just igniting, reflecting in a brass compass and blank vellum cards. Fog curls behind them like a stage curtain. Maintain clear separation around each lantern for CSS masking and leave the middle foreground quiet for HTML text. Mature hand-painted 2D art, lithographic ink, gouache, watercolor and fine aged-paper grain, coal, fog green, brass and amber. No numbers, labels, text, logo, watermark, confetti or copyrighted reference.
